description: Add two new fields named 'X_COORD' and 'Y_COORD' (Type: Double, Size: 20, Precision: 6) to the attribute table of the Natural Earth populated places shapefile located at '/home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp'. Populate these fields with the longitude and latitude coordinates of each point feature and export the resulting layer as a new shapefile to '/home/ga/gvsig_data/exports/cities_with_coords.shp'.
